overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dirt trail through tall grass in a dark forest at night, holding a torch that illuminates the immediate path. The footage appears to be from a video game, featuring a continuous approach toward and passage of a large landmark tree on the right side of the trail.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail holding a torch that swings with each step, illuminating the path and tall grass ahead

tall green grass lining the left side of the trail
tall green grass lining the right side of the trail
large solitary tree with dense canopy visible ahead on the trail
dark silhouette of distant trees against the night sky
dark silhouette of distant trees against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass at night. The torch illuminates the immediate path while a large tree looms ahead in the distance, framed by dark forest silhouettes against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving forest trail passing large tree

events.description: passing the large tree on the right side as the trail curves gently to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, passing the large tree on the right and following the curving path deeper into the forest while the torch swings

entered.detail: small shrubbery visible on the left side of the trail
dense underbrush and smaller vegetation on the left

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes the large tree on the right side as the trail curves. The torch continues to swing, illuminating the path and revealing additional undergrowth on the left while the large tree moves from the center of view to the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark forest trail that leads from a distant view of a landmark tree to a close passage beside it. It begins with a walk down a narrow dirt path through tall grass, where a handheld torch illuminates the immediate ground while a large tree looms in the distance against the night sky. As the camera advances, the torch swings to reveal dense undergrowth on the left, drawing the viewer closer to the looming silhouette. The scene then shifts as the trail curves, causing the large tree to move from the center of the frame to the right side. Finally, the camera passes the massive trunk, leaving the landmark behind as the path continues into the dark woods.
